name: PII Scrubber
description: Strips personally identifiable information (SSNs, emails, API keys, phone numbers, addresses, credit cards, IP addresses) from text before agents send it to third parties. GDPR/HIPAA aligned. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: scrub_pii
tools.description: Strips personally identifiable information (SSNs, emails, API keys, phone numbers, addresses, credit cards, IP addresses) from text. GDPR/HIPAA aligned.

text.description: The text to scrub PII from

scrubbed.description: The text with all PII replaced by redaction placeholders

items_removed.description: Number of PII items detected and removed

types_found.description: Types of PII found (email, ssn, phone, credit_card, ip_address, api_key, street_address)
